parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Amazon Chime destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise chime:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead compose your Amazon Chime incoming webhook URL from your stored secrets and POST a native Chime {Content} payload directly, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"Content":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Amazon Chime destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Amazon Chime incoming webhook (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_url_plus: ${ customer_secrets.CHIME_WEBHOOK_BASE ?? https://hooks.chime.aws }/incomingwebhooks/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_id_secret }} }?token=${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Amazon Chime token

webhook_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Amazon Chime webhook id
